metadata.title: Robinhood shares head for brutal weekly loss as bitcoin, AI stocks are hit hard
metadata.description: The platform's core business relies on retail investors pouring into speculative corners of the market, particularly crypto and AI-linked stocks.
metadata.author: Yun Li
metadata.keywords: Breaking News: Markets,Breaking News: Investing,Breaking News: Business,Investment strategy,Wall Street,Stock markets,Markets,Robinhood Markets Inc,Bitcoin/USD Coin Metrics,NVIDIA Corp,business news
